messages.content: Hi! How can I help you today?

Hi! I need some help with a recent order. I accidentally added a fleece jacket and would like to remove it. Also, I want to change the skateboard in my order to a maple material, 34 inch, with a graphic design. If those changes aren’t possible, I’d prefer to just cancel the whole order. And, if you could, I’d like to know the total price for all the grills I’ve bought from you before. Thanks!

message.content: Hi! I need some help with a recent order. I accidentally added a fleece jacket and would like to remove it. Also, I want to change the skateboard in my order to a maple material, 34 inch, with a graphic design. If those changes aren’t possible, I’d prefer to just cancel the whole order. And, if you could, I’d like to know the total price for all the grills I’ve bought from you before. Thanks!
